archetypes.title: Best overall
archetypes.rationale: The highest-scoring safe routine across all signals: concern fit first, then review quality, popularity, and value.

archetypes.title: Budget-friendly
archetypes.rationale: Targets the same concerns while keeping every item affordable and the total under a cap.

archetypes.title: Gentle on sensitive skin
archetypes.rationale: Avoids the harsher actives (retinoids, benzoyl peroxide, glycolic acid) and leans on gentler ingredients that still target your concerns.

archetypes.title: Minimal 3-step
archetypes.rationale: The fewest steps that still address your top concern: cleanse, one treatment, moisturize (plus SPF in the morning).

archetypes.title: Comprehensive
archetypes.rationale: A fully built-out routine where the treatment and serum target different concerns, split across morning and night.
